rulings.Case Title: JOHN BLUMENTHAL ET AL VS. MITRA MAHDAVI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Defendant Behzad Nasres Motion To Strike The Two Accepted Ccp 998 Offers, Remove False Documents Filed With The Clerk Of The Superior Court, To Refer The Matter To The San Francisco District Attorney And To The California State Bar, And For Imposition Of Sanctions Against Attorneys Yosef Peretz And Sumy Kim [ Ccp 128.5]
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday February 3, 2016, line 3. DEFENDANT BEHZAD NASRE Notice Of Defendant Behzad Nasres Motion To Strike The Two Accepted Ccp 998 Offers, Remove False Documents Filed With The Clerk Of The Superior Court, To Refer The Matter To The San Francisco District Attorney And To The California State Bar, And For Imposition Of Sanctions Against Attorneys Yosef Peretz And Sumy Kim [ Ccp 128.5] GRANTED in part. The CCP 998 acceptances filed on January 11, 2016 are stricken. Per December 23, 2015 e-mail (1) offers mailed on December 22, 2015 were revoked and (2) intended offer is to be hand delivered. Plaintiffs do not provide any evidence that the offers accepted on January 11, 2015 were not the offers mailed on December 22, 2015 of that they were hand-delivered. However, in light of some confusion regarding the amount listed in the revoked December 22, 2015 offers, the Court denies the additional relief requested in this motion. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MICHELLE CATAPANO VS. NASIR PATEL ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendants The Negev, Llc And Danny Habers Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents And Production Of Documents, And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday February 3, 2016, line 5. PLAINTIFF MICHELLE CATAPANO, WILLIAM LU, SIRAK SEYOUME, TANITH NICHOLS, ERIN SMITH, JOHN MULLINS Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendants The Negev, Llc And Danny Habers Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents And Production Of Documents, And Request For Sanctions GRANTED. Within 30 days of the date of hearing, Defendants Nasir Patel, Nasreen Patel and Abulala, LLC shall make further responses without objection except as to privilege to Document Requests Nos. 1, 2, 3, 10, 17, and 18 shall produce all documents identified in said further responses as well as in all previous responses and shall provide an item-by-item log as to all documents withheld under claim of privilege. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MICHELLE CATAPANO VS. NASIR PATEL ET AL

rulings.Case Title: CORAL PARTNERS, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY ET AL VS. SANJAY L PATEL ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Defendants Sanja Y L. Patel And Rinas. Patels Petition To Compel Arbitration And Motion To Stay Pending Unlawful Detainer Action
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday February 3, 2016, line 7. DEFENDANT SANJAY PATEL, RINA PATEL Notice Of Defendants Sanja Y L. Patel And Rinas. Patels Petition To Compel Arbitration And Motion To Stay Pending Unlawful Detainer Action DENIED. Defendant waived arbitration by seeking adjudication on the merits (e.g. legal sufficiency of the operative notice to quit) and seeking and obtaining discovery not available in the arbitration forum. = (501/REQ)
